newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent event was the Q3 FY26 earnings call (~June 3), which showed 8% sales growth (6.5% organic), book-to-bill 1.05, grid sales +20%, Amran/Narayan integration progressing, and a portfolio tilt to electronics/engineering (~70% of sales). Nothing new ties reed sensors/magnetics to AI liquid-cooling or robotics in-window.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: solid Q3 (grid +20%, B/B 1.05) confirms a healthy industrial, but no in-window evidence links reed sensors/magnetics to AI liquid-cooling instrumentation or robotics. +41% YTD rerating already runs ahead of any proven AI-chain content. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Reed/magnetics/electronics could feed liquid-cooling instrumentation and robotics sensing; grid momentum and acquisitions broaden the base.
verdicts.neutral: Quality multi-industrial executing well, but the AI/robotics sensor pathway is still a thesis without booked AI-chain revenue.
verdicts.bear: Big YTD rerating on broad industrial strength, not AI evidence; speculative latent link risks de-rating if AI content never appears.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A named liquid-cooling instrumentation or humanoid-robotics sensor/magnetics design win.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Multiple expansion without AI-chain confirmation; reverts to industrial-cyclical valuation.
